title: tool_intercept: ToolInterceptor::clear inconsistent with extract_all_tool_calls (in_function_calls leak)
description:
## Severity
Trivial
## Dimension
kiss
## Location
src/tool_intercept.rs:111-114 (clear) vs src/tool_intercept.rs:243-272 (extract_all_tool_calls)
## Violation
extract_all_tool_calls clears the buffer but not the `in_function_calls` flag:

```rust
pub fn clear(&mut self) {
    self.buffer.clear();
    self.in_function_calls = false;
}
```

vs.

```rust
self.buffer.clear();   // extract_all_tool_calls — does NOT touch in_function_calls
```

`has_pending_tool_calls` returns `true` because `self.in_function_calls` is honored at line 148. The flag is also never SET by any code path in this module, so today the bug is dormant — but the dead flag plus the inconsistent reset is a latent bug waiting for someone to add a `self.in_function_calls = true` line.

## Mandated refactor
Either remove the in_function_calls field entirely (it has no writer) or have extract_all_tool_calls end with `self.clear()` instead of `self.buffer.clear()`.
## Filed from QA review dispatch
